name: aps-doc-skills
description: Skills for drafting Korean project documents (착수 보고서, 요구사항 정의서, 회의록) as styled .docx files.

plugins.name: docs-report
plugins.description: Draft Korean project documents (착수 보고서, 요구사항 정의서, 회의록) as styled .docx files — from an existing draft or through conversation.

plugins.name: ppt-report
plugins.description: Create Korean PPT reports (PPT 보고서) as .pptx via a docs-first workflow — build a source .docx, then derive the slide deck from it. Enforces IT전략팀 team rules.

plugins.name: design-ppt
plugins.description: Render a Claude-Design-style HTML deck into a pixel-faithful Korean .pptx — each <section> becomes one 1920×1080 slide via headless-Chrome render + full-bleed assembly. Enforces IT전략팀 team rules.
